narrative:
Chesterfield (precinct in Fulton County) has 641 registered voters, with 48.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.2 percentage points.
